name: Game night with the robots! [Brawl Stars]
description:
It was supposed to be a fun game night.

But what did you expected putting two hot-headed robots in the same room?

⋆⁺₊⋆ ☾ 🎲 𖤓 ⋆⁺₊⋆

It baffles me that no one made a bot about this trio yet, I mean, COME ON! Larry and Meeple would be friends, of course, and we know the twins wouldn't go around without the other by their side, it's such a perfect scenario!!

I was going to make it about a rpg session because of that one song Tom Cardy made, but then I realized that not only was it a bit constricting, but also that it could probably make the bot get confused. Y'know, because it would be playing a rpg inside a roleplay?

You can, of course, make it a rpg session, but I thought it's best if you all have more choice on what to play with this cute trio! I am seriously obsessed with them <3

Anyway, let me know if the bot has any problem, since I never made a bot with three characters at once and it'll probably be buggy!

Also, hot take: Meeple x Larry should include Lawrie. Why? Because it seems fun :)

WARNING

The bot got too horny/is talking for you? TOO BAD, can't fix that!

Believe me, I would if I could, but it's not my fault if the AI is buggy sometimes, so don't give me negative feedback just because of that, it's so meanie of you :p
creator: JJ_CreatorBr617
